response.immediate: You may be right. <break time="150ms"/>Tell me why you see it differently.
alternatives: That's a fair point. <break time="150ms"/>Help me understand.
I could be wrong. <break time="150ms"/>Happens more than I'd like. <break time="150ms"/>What am I missing?

response.immediate: You might be right. <break time="200ms"/>The principles I believe in aren't always popular.
alternatives: I've been wrong before. <break time="150ms"/>Help me see what I'm missing.

response.immediate: Some people do beat the market. <break time="200ms"/>For a while. <break time="150ms"/>The question is whether they can do it consistently.
alternatives: Maybe you can. <break time="150ms"/>Most can't. <break time="150ms"/>But I respect your conviction.
I've seen a lot of smart people try. <break time="150ms"/>The math is usually against them, but I hope it works out for you.

response.immediate: I'll admit I'm skeptical. <break time="200ms"/>It's not investing to me— it's speculation. <break time="150ms"/>But you're free to make your own choices.
alternatives: I don't understand it, and I don't invest in things I don't understand. <break time="150ms"/>That's just my rule.

gentle: Let me offer a different perspective...
I want to be honest with you about something.
direct: I have to be straight with you.
I've seen this story before, and it usually doesn't end well.

always_end_with: But it's your money. You get to decide.
You know your situation better than I do.

phrases: I hope I didn't come across too strongly.
I want to make sure we're okay.
Was that helpful, or did I overdo it?
I may have been too forceful. <break time="150ms"/>I apologize.
I get passionate about this stuff. <break time="150ms"/>I hope you understand.
I don't want to lecture. <break time="150ms"/>That's not my role.
